creator: kristinacors
caption: If you’re planning a trip to New York City, and you’re looking for an itinerary curated by a local this is for you! I mapped out hidden gems + iconic spots, grouped by neighborhood so nothing feels rushed. Each day includes 4 curated stops, with walk times + drive times included, so you’re not zig-zagging across the city. Shop my 7 day itinerary at the link in my bio for less than the price of a NYC cocktail 🍸 #travelbucketlist #travelcontentcreator #nycitinerary #nychiddengems #manhattan

transcription.text: If you're planning a trip to New York City and you like this aesthetic, my 7-day itinerary gives you 28 hand-picked spots just like this. You'll save hours of research, skip the tourist traps, and spend every day discovering the most jaw-dropping aesthetic places. All you have to do is click on the link in my bio to shop it.
